artifact_30_bonus.description: Sailing artifact 30 (Onyx Lantern) bonus - added to the base onyxStatueBonus of 2

zenith_market_0_bonus.description: ZenithMarket bonus 0 (True Zen) - added to the base 50 in zenithStatueBonus calculation

event_shop_19_owned.description: Event shop bonus 19 (0 or 30) - game returns 0/1, multiplied by 0.3*100 to match domain's hardcoded 30

meritocracy_26_bonus.description: Meritocracy bonus 26 (statue bonus) - part of otherBonuses multiplier

upgrade_vault_25_bonus.description: UpgradeVault upgrade 25 computed bonus (%) - applied to statues at indices [0, 1, 2, 6] only

voodoo_statufication_bonus.description: Voodoo Statufication talent bonus (skillIndex 56, -1 = best across all players)

statue_0_bonus.description: Statue index 0 bonus (upgrade vault bonus applies, index is in [0,1,2,6])

statue_1_bonus.description: Statue index 1 bonus (upgrade vault bonus applies, index is in [0,1,2,6])

statue_5_bonus.description: Statue index 5 bonus (upgrade vault bonus does NOT apply - not in [0,1,2,6])

statue_24_bonus.description: Statue index 24 bonus (upgrade vault bonus does NOT apply)

statue_29_bonus.description: Dragon statue (index 29) bonus - used as dragonStatueBonus input; dragon does NOT apply dragonStatueBonus to itself
